_comment: Each key must exactly match a meal name in meals.json. 'ingredients' is a list of strings. 'instructions' is a short method. 'vegetarian' is true or false and controls the green asterisk marker. 'cost' is the price of that meal (a plain number, no currency symbol) — 'currency' below sets which symbol is shown for it across the whole site, including lunch.json and breakfast.json.

Spaghetti Bolognese.instructions: Brown the mince, soften the onion, carrot and garlic, add tomatoes and puree, simmer 20 mins. Serve over cooked spaghetti with parmesan.

Chicken Curry.instructions: Fry onion, garlic and ginger, add curry powder, then chicken. Pour in coconut milk and simmer 15 mins. Serve with rice and coriander.

Veggie Stir Fry.instructions: Fry tofu until golden, set aside. Stir fry vegetables, add tofu, soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss with cooked noodles and sesame seeds.

Beef Tacos.instructions: Brown mince with taco seasoning and a splash of water. Fill taco shells with mince, lettuce, tomato, cheese and sour cream.

Salmon & Roast Veg.instructions: Toss vegetables in oil, roast 20 mins at 200C. Add salmon for the final 12 mins. Squeeze lemon over before serving.

Mushroom Risotto.instructions: Soften onion and mushrooms, add rice and wine, then add stock gradually, stirring, until creamy. Stir through butter and parmesan.

Lentil Soup.instructions: Saute onion, carrot and celery, add lentils, cumin, tomatoes and stock. Simmer 25 mins until lentils are soft, then blend if desired.

Chicken Caesar Salad.instructions: Grill or pan-fry chicken until cooked, slice. Toss lettuce with dressing, top with chicken, parmesan and croutons.

Sausage & Mash.instructions: Grill sausages until browned. Boil and mash potatoes with butter and milk. Fry onions and stir through gravy. Serve together.

Margherita Pizza.instructions: Spread passata over the base, tear over mozzarella, drizzle with oil and bake at 220C for 10-12 mins. Top with fresh basil.

Cottage Pie.instructions: Brown the mince with the onion and carrot, then stir in the Worcestershire sauce and stock and simmer for 20 mins until thickened. Meanwhile boil the potatoes for 15-20 mins until tender, then mash with the butter and milk. Spoon the mince into a baking dish, top with the mash, and bake at 200C for 20-25 mins until golden on top.

Chilli Con Carne.instructions: Brown the mince with the onion and garlic. Stir in the chilli powder and cumin, then add the tomatoes and kidney beans. Simmer for 25-30 mins, stirring occasionally, until rich and thickened. Serve over cooked rice.

Chicken Fajitas.instructions: Toss the chicken and vegetables in the fajita seasoning. Fry over a high heat for 8-10 mins until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are lightly charred. Warm the tortillas and serve everything together with sour cream and grated cheese for topping.

Fish & Chips.instructions: Toss the chips in oil and roast at 200C for 30-35 mins, turning halfway, until golden and crisp. Coat the fish fillets in batter or breadcrumbs and bake or fry for the final 12-15 mins until cooked through. Boil the peas for the last 5 mins. Serve with a wedge of lemon.

Shepherd's Pie.instructions: Brown the lamb mince with the onion and carrot, then stir in the stock and simmer for 20 mins. Add the peas for the last 5 mins. Meanwhile boil and mash the potatoes with the butter and milk. Spoon the lamb mixture into a baking dish, top with mash, and bake at 200C for 20-25 mins until golden.

Thai Green Curry.instructions: Fry the curry paste for a minute until fragrant, then add the chicken and cook until sealed. Pour in the coconut milk and add the pepper and green beans, then simmer for 15 mins until the chicken is cooked through. Stir in fish sauce and lime juice to taste, and serve with rice.
